title: Cloud Architect

rationales.taskAutomation: AI can draft standard reference architectures and IaC scaffolding, but vendor tradeoffs, cost governance, and enterprise-scale design decisions remain judgment calls.
rationales.toolMaturity: IaC generation and cloud-design copilots are credible and improving quickly but not yet a mature, near-solved capability.
rationales.adoption: Adoption is spreading across large enterprises undertaking cloud migration and modernization programs.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can generate and validate infrastructure templates against a given design; the design decision itself stays with the architect.

tasksAtRisk: Generating baseline IaC templates for common patterns
Producing cost-estimate spreadsheets for known workloads
tasksGrowing: Enterprise cloud strategy and vendor negotiation
Multi-cloud cost and resilience tradeoff decisions
Security and compliance architecture for regulated workloads
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 15-1241 (Computer Network Architects, closest cloud-architecture mapping), p25-p75
insight: AI can draft a reference architecture and the IaC to match it, but choosing between vendors, owning the cost/resilience tradeoff, and getting a regulated workload through security review still take an accountable architect.
